category_sources: source_facts.description says iat converts many CD-ROM image formats to ISO9660; official SourceForge page describes Iso9660 Analyzer Tool detecting image-file structures.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page at https://sourceforge.net/projects/iat.berlios/ uses the display name Iso9660 Analyzer Tool.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available official documentation/homepage surface for iat.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge page exposes downloads/files but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SourceForge summary identify CD-ROM image analysis/conversion to ISO9660.
